overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a hooded robe exploring a detailed Gothic castle interior. The character ascends a grand staircase, passes through timber-framed corridors, and enters a circular amphitheater classroom before continuing into darker stone hallways. The environment features festive decorations, portraits, and transitions from warm candlelit spaces to cooler dimly lit areas.

segments.scene_description: Ascending a narrower side staircase lined with framed portraits in gold frames, the character climbs toward an upper level with warm wall sconce lighting.

segments.scene_description: Entering a large circular amphitheater with tiered wooden seating, the character approaches the center podium, pauses briefly, then turns toward the exit stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit stone corridor with gothic arches

segments.scene_description: Exiting into a dimly lit stone corridor with gothic arches and tall windows showing night outside, the character walks forward and descends a staircase to a lower level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a festive, grand entrance hall through the intimate upper reaches of a castle and into a cold, nocturnal corridor. It begins by passing Christmas wreaths and a suit of armor in the main hall before ascending a wide stone staircase that narrows into a gallery of gold-framed portraits illuminated by warm wall sconces. As the character reaches the upper level, the space shifts into a tight corridor of exposed dark timber beams that leads directly into a vast, circular amphitheater with tiered wooden seating. After a brief pause at the center podium, the camera turns toward the exit, transitioning from the warm interior light into a dimly lit stone hallway defined by gothic arches and tall windows revealing the night sky. The movement finally concludes as the character descends a staircase toward a lower level of the fortress.
